evals.prompt: Search the web for recent articles about EU AI Act regulations from the past month, get me 10 results
evals.expected_output: Uses search with query, limit=10, tbs='qdr:m'
expectations: Uses search tool with relevant query
Uses tbs='qdr:m' for past month filter
Returns results with full page content

evals.prompt: Extract structured pricing data from https://example.com/pricing — I need plan names, monthly prices, and feature lists as JSON
expectations: Provides JSON schema with plan name, price, features
Includes prompt describing what to extract
Schema uses correct types (string, number, array)
